Member.name: pf_pci_t0_base_class_code
Member.help: Base class code of the device

Member.name: pf_pci_t0_subsystem_id
Member.help: Subsystem ID of the device.

Member.name: pf_pci_t0_device_id
Member.help: PCI device ID

Member.name: pf_pci_t0_int_pin
Member.help: Legacy interrupt pin setting

Member.name: rcec_pci_t0_int_pin
Member.help: Legacy interrupt pin setting

Member.name: tee_io_supp
Member.help: TEE IO Support Capability Field

Member.name: dis_wrt_buff_cont
Member.help: Disable execution of Write Buffer Continuation commands. Only supported for an SDM with a Co-Processor (e.g. CDED).

Member.name: dis_pri
Member.help: Disable the Page Request Interface (PRI) capability.

Member.name: allow_gpa
Member.help: Allow Guest Physical Address's (GPA) for Non-Completion Address's in the Command by asserting the GPA field within the Command. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command execution violates this setting.

Member.name: allow_va
Member.help: Allow Virtual Address's (VA) for Non-Completion Address's in the Command by de-asserting the GPA field within the Command. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command execution violates this setting.

Member.name: allow_cpl_gpa
Member.help: Allow Guest Physical Address's (GPA) for Completion Address's in the Command by asserting the GPA field within the Command. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command execution violates this setting..

Member.name: allow_cpl_va
Member.help: Allow Virtual Address's (VA) for Completion Address's in the Command by de-asserting the GPA field within the Command. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command execution violates this setting..

Member.name: allow_priv
Member.help: Allow Privileged Command execution, the Priv field within the Command is allowed to be asserted. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command execution violates this setting.

Member.name: allow_nonpriv
Member.help: Allow Non-Privileged Command execution, the Priv field within the Command is allowed to be de-asserted. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command execution violates this setting..

Member.name: allow_posted
Member.help: Allow Posted Command submissions. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command submission violates this setting.

Member.name: allow_nonposted
Member.help: Allow Non-Posted Command submissions. The command is dropped and an error will be reported if the command submission violates this setting.

Member.name: gpa_pasid_en
Member.help: Enable the Process Address Space ID (PASID) field for Source/Destionation Command Pointers with the GPA field set in the command.

Member.name: cpl_gpa_pasid_en
Member.help: Enable the Process Address Space ID (PASID) field for the Completion Command Pointer with the CPL_GPA field set in the command.

Member.name: pf_crs_resp_data
Member.help: Physical Function Configuration Response Status (CRS) data response when reading the Vendor Register and the accel is not ready. 1'b0 = Return 0xFFFF0001, 1'b1 = Return 0xFFFFFFFF

Member.name: vf_crs_resp_data
Member.help: Virtual Function Configuration Response Status (CRS) data response when reading the Vendor Register and the accel is not ready. 1'b0 = Return 0xFFFF0001, 1'b1 = Return 0xFFFFFFFF

Member.name: total_vfs
Member.help: The number of VFs to report in the SRIOV capability TotalVFs field for the device. Refer to PCIe Base Spec 9.3.3.6 for details.

Member.name: dti_lim_trans_cnt
Member.help: The maximum amount of outstanding requests allowed on the DTI interface. The field setting is incremented by 1 for amount of outstanding requests.

Member.name: dti_inv_lim_trans_cnt
Member.help: The maximum amount of outstanding ATS Invalidate commands allowed on the DTI interface. The field setting is incremented by 1 for amount of outstanding requests

Member.name: lti_lim_trans_cnt
Member.help: The maximum amount of outstanding requests allowed on the LTI interface. The field setting is incremented by 1 for amount of outstanding requests.

Member.name: tot_dwq_num_entries_avail
Member.help: The maximum number of commands the Descriptor Command Buffer supports. The field setting is incremented by 1 for the maximum number of commands supported..

Member.name: rd_lim_cnt
Member.help: Max outstanding read requests on ACE-Lite interface. Allowed is encoding + 1.

Member.name: wr_lim_cnt
Member.help: Max outstanding write requests on ACE-Lite interface. Allowed is encoding + 1.

Member.name: isolation_enable
Member.help: Isolation control over an entire accelerator instance.

Member.name: emm_resp_code
Member.help: EMM response code. Refer to PCR MAS for details. Valid values are 0 (EMM disabled) and 1 through 31 where higher values represent higher freq output clock.
